sentences.english: If I could talk to my younger self, I'd say 'Don't worry so much.'
sentences.korean: 어린 나에게 말할 수 있다면 '너무 걱정하지 마'라고 할 거예요. 걱정했던 것들 대부분은 일어나지 않았어요.

sentences.english: Most of the things I worried about never happened.
sentences.korean: 내가 걱정했던 것들 대부분은 일어나지 않았어.

sentences.english: I'd tell myself to travel more in my twenties, when I had fewer responsibilities.
Now it's harder to find the time.
sentences.korean: 책임이 적을 때요. 지금은 시간 내기가 더 어려워요.

sentences.english: I'd say 'Be yourself and stop trying to impress everyone.'
sentences.korean: '너 자신이 되고 모두에게 잘 보이려 하지 마'라고 말할 거예요. 그 교훈을 배우는 데 수년이 걸렸어요.

sentences.english: It took me years to learn that lesson.
sentences.korean: 그 교훈을 배우는 데 수년이 걸렸어.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
